{% extends "marketplace/vendor/base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% load currency_filters %} {% block title %}{% trans "商品列表" %} · {{ vendor.company_name }}{% endblock %} {% block nav_products %}active{% endblock %} {% block extra_vendor_css %} .vendor-unified-shell { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:20px; } .vendor-hero { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#111827,#2563eb 55%,#22c55e); border-radius:28px; color:#fff; padding:26px; box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.22); } .vendor-hero-actions .btn { border-radius:999px; padding:12px 20px; font-weight:700; } .vendor-stat-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)); gap:14px; } .vendor-stat-card { background:rgba(255,255,255,.12); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16); border-radius:20px; padding:16px; backdrop-filter:blur(12px); } .vendor-stat-label { font-size:.78rem; opacity:.86; } .vendor-stat-value { font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:800; } .vendor-panel-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:24px; box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(15,23,42,.06); } .vendor-toolbar { padding:18px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; } .vendor-search { display:flex; gap:10px; flex:1; min-width:260px; } .vendor-search .form-control { border-radius:16px; min-height:48px; } .vendor-table thead th { font-size:.76rem; letter-spacing:.06em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#64748b; border-bottom:none; } .vendor-table tbody td { padding:18px 16px; vertical-align:middle; } .vendor-row-title { font-weight:800; color:#0f172a; } .vendor-row-meta { color:#64748b; font-size:.82rem; } .vendor-thumb { width:56px; height:56px; border-radius:16px; object-fit:cover; box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(15,23,42,.12); } .vendor-thumb-placeholder { width:56px; height:56px; border-radius:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2563eb,#22c55e); color:#fff; } .vendor-status-pill { border-radius:999px; padding:7px 12px; font-weight:700; font-size:.78rem; } .vendor-actions { display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; } .vendor-actions .btn { border-radius:999px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; text-align:center; line-height:1; } .vendor-actions .btn-outline-info { width:32px; height:32px; padding:0; flex-shrink:0; } @media (max-width: 991px) { .vendor-stat-grid { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)); } } @media (max-width: 767px) { .vendor-stat-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } } {% endblock %} {% block vendor_content %}

{% trans "商品列表" %}

{% trans "总库存" %}
{{ total_stock }}

{% trans "商品" %} {% trans "分类" %} {% trans "价格" %} {% trans "库存" %} {% trans "销量" %} {% trans "状态" %} {% trans "操作" %}
{% if product.image %} {% else %}
{% endif %}
{{ product.name }}
SKU: {{ product.sku|default:"-" }}
 {{ product.category.name|default:"-" }} {{ product.price|fcfa }} {{ product.stock }} {{ product.sales_count }} {% if product.is_active %}{% trans "上架" %} {% else %}{% trans "下架" %}{% endif %}
{% trans "编辑" %}
{% csrf_token %}

    • {% endfor %} {% if products.has_next %}
  • »
    • {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endblock %}
